LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT OMNI HOTELS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT SHOWN THE LOCATION DESIGNATED BY DEFENDANT CORPORATIONS AS THEIR PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS AS REQUIRED BY CORPORATIONS CODE SECTION 2105(A)(3). ACCORDINGLY, VENUE APPEARS PROPER IN THIS COUNTY. THE COURT EXERCISES IT DISCRETION UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 397(C) TO TRANSFER THE CASE TO SAN DIEGO COUNTY WHERE THE INJURY OCCURRED. THERE ARE NO WITNESSES IN SAN FRANCISCO AND TRAVELING TO SAN DIEGO FOR TRIAL DOES NOT CONSTITUTE A MATERIAL BURDEN TO PLAINTIFF OR A BURDEN ANY GREATER THAT TRAVELING TO SAN FRANCISCO FOR TRIAL. MS. GREENBERG IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
